description: CompositionBlack and white shorts made of CVC, with welt pockets, drawcord elastic waist, embroidered logo on the left and adidas Essentials 3-Stripes along the length of the legsFittingComfortWash careWash using water less than 30degree C heatDo not soakDo not tumble dryDo not bleachDry in shadeFlat dryCool ironMade of durable CVC material, these shorts guarantee high colour-fastness and perfect durability. Ideal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs, these adidas shorts are made with a breathable fabric combination that is better than cotton to wick sweat away from your skin and keep you comfortably cool. These adidas shorts have a ventilated design that allow you to focus on performance while you indulge in your favourite sport or fitness activity. While the soft and broad elastic waistband sits snugly, the white strips on the sides allow free and flexible movement. The drawstrings on the inside allow you to create a customised Fit and the deep side pockets can hold your essentials, including an iPod, when you're on the move.
